name: Heath Bar Mocha Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 8 Heath English Toffee bars (1.4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F.
Coarsely chop 4 Heath bars and finely chop the remaining 4 bars. Reserve separately.
CRUST:
Grind cookies into fine crumbs in a food processor. Add melted butter and process until mixed.
Press mixture into bottom and about 1 inch up sides of a 9 1/2-inch springform pan. Sprinkle coarsely chopped Heath bars over crust. Refrigerate while preparing filling.
FILLING:
Combine 1/2 cup cream and coffee crystals in a 1-cup glass measure. Heat for 40-60 seconds or until coffee dissolves when stirred. Refrigerate until cool, about 15 minutes.
Beat together cream cheese and sugar in a large bowl on medium speed until smooth, 1-2 minutes. Beat in 1/2 cup cooled cream, eggs, and vanilla until well mixed, 1-2 minutes.
With mixer on low speed, beat in chilled coffee-cream mixture; continue beating 5 minutes.
Turn batter into prepared crust. Bake for 1 hour and 15-20 minutes, or until cheesecake looks set around edges and center still jiggles slightly. Let cool; then refrigerate.
TOPPING:
Heat chocolate chips and remaining 1/3 cup cream in a double boiler until melted and smooth. Let cool slightly in refrigerator.
Spread topping over cheesecake. Sprinkle finely chopped candy bars on top. Refrigerate until chocolate layer is set and cake is well chilled, 6 hours. Loosen the cake with a knife around the edge of the pan and remove the springform side pan.
